markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If HADES by Melanie Martinez's sales, on the Hits Daily Double Top 50 Chart dated April 2, 2026, are At least 5000, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: This event will specifically encompass the number listed under the Albums column on the Hits Daily Double’s Top 50 chart for the relevant week. If data is unavailable or partially unavailable by the Expiration date, then all affected markets resolve to No. Hits Daily Double recently adjusted the release timing of its weekly Top 50 Album Chart, publishing the chart with a Thursday date instead of the previously-used Friday date. Given the changed schedule of release from Friday to Thursday, Kalshi will resolve future markets using the chart dated Thursday as the Contract Underlying, pursuant to Rule 7.2(a). Note: this event is directional.
markets.title: Will HADES have At least 5000 pure album sales on the Hits Daily Double Top 50 Chart for April 2, 2026?

markets.early_close_condition: If this event occurs, the market will close the following 10:15am, 11am, or 3pm ET.
markets.rules_primary: If AAA reports that the price of national average regular gas for the US is less than $3.80 at any time from Issuance through Dec 31, 2026, inclusive, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Please note: This market only considers AAA prices posted from Issuance (March 23, 2026) through December 31, 2026, inclusive; prices reported earlier in 2026 do not count.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If WOR$T GIRL IN AMERICA by Slayyyter's sales, on the Hits Daily Double Top 50 Chart dated April 2, 2026, are At least 5000, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: This event will specifically encompass the number listed under the Albums column on the Hits Daily Double’s Top 50 chart for the relevant week. If data is unavailable or partially unavailable by the Expiration date, then all affected markets resolve to No. Hits Daily Double recently adjusted the release timing of its weekly Top 50 Album Chart, publishing the chart with a Thursday date instead of the previously-used Friday date. Given the changed schedule of release from Friday to Thursday, Kalshi will resolve future markets using the chart dated Thursday as the Contract Underlying, pursuant to Rule 7.2(a). Note: this event is directional.
markets.title: Will WOR$T GIRL IN AMERICA have At least 5000 pure album sales on the Hits Daily Double Top 50 Chart for April 2, 2026?
